name: Automation & CI
description: CI workflows, scripts, maps under automation/, and tooling.

name: Content & messaging
description: Canonical copy, products, use cases, case studies, and narrative.

name: Governance & policy
description: Rules, review expectations, legal/compliance, naming, and editor rules alignment.

name: Go-live & repo setup
description: Before public: labels, branch protection, CODEOWNERS, hosting, read site, visibility.

name: Testing / sign-off
description: Someone still needs to verify the check, workflow, or process (manual or automated).

name: Feature / build
description: New capability: build it, ship it, or add a new check.

name: Work session
description: Time-boxed: walkthrough, training, or stakeholder session (not only code).

name: Roadmap: soon
description: High confidence next; right after or alongside launch prep.

name: Roadmap: later
description: Scoping or priority TBD; not required for first public day.

name: P0 - launch blocker
description: Must close or explicitly accept risk before / at go-live. (Same as backlog “P0”.)

name: P1 - important soon
description: Do right after launch if not blocking. (Same as backlog “P1”.)

name: P2 - backlog
description: When there is capacity. (Same as backlog “P2”.)

name: Launch program
description: Counts toward the pre-go-live project or release board.

name: Needs: legal review
description: Legal or compliance should look at content or claims before publishing.

name: Needs: product or GTM
description: Product, marketing, or GTM should confirm scope, naming, or positioning.

name: Downstream
description: Outbound: repo canon changed; templates, datasheets, docs, web, or other surfaces need follow-up.

name: Inbound
description: Inbound: ships, GTM, or external requests driving updates to canonical messaging in this repo.
